title: sutera tenuifolia
intro: Sutera tenuifolia, also known as Thunbergia grandiflora, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Acanthaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits associated with Sutera tenuifolia include reducing fever, relieving cough and cold symptoms, and improving respiratory health. Sutera tenuifolia can be prepared as a tea, decoction, or infusion, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
